TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Lidaw, title = Lidaw, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lidaw} }

S.FORM: alang Lidaw ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Ci'an go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 1,118 buwan, 2,835 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 32% kyan ku 899 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 68% kyan ku 1,936 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 29%, Truku 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Lidaw hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Lidaw hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Lidaw hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Lidaw hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Lidaw hya' ga Taracan. tay 'zil na Lidaw hya' ga Pukpuk. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Lidaw ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Ci'an go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 1,118 buwan, 2,835 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 32% kyan ku 899 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 68% kyan ku 1,936 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 29%, Truku 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Lidaw hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Lidaw hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Lidaw hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Lidaw hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Lidaw hya' ga Taracan. tay 'zil na Lidaw hya' ga Pukpuk. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč li*aw …£a nija mki s~…ēku kariŇč keŇč atu ¶~ ®i Ēan …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *,*** ő≤uwan, *,*** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *,*** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, amis~…ē **%, truku *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran, Ňčas~…ēal ps~…ēatu te…£ami ru pqniqan iju. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na li*aw ńßja Ē …£a ő≤s~…ēiluŇč. taj Ēzil na li*aw ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax. taj mkjańßu Ē na li*aw ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkraja Ē na li*aw ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkjańßu Ē na li*aw ńßja Ē …£a tara ¶~ ®an. taj Ēzil na li*aw ńßja Ē …£a pukpuk. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj. pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē. tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
